name: Barlow Street Community Center
description: Barlow Street Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saint Albans Bay, VT. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Collins Perley Fitness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Collins Perley Fitness Center in Saint Albans City, VT! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Georgia Beach
description: Georgia Beach is a place to play pickleball in Saint Albans Bay, VT. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Highgate Arena
description: Come play pickleball at Highgate Arena in Highgate Center, VT! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Marble Mill Park
description: Come play pickleball at Marble Mill Park in Swanton, VT! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
